text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 104 

MDCR_PTBNI_TOTAL_FFS_USE 

LABEL: Medicare Use (FFS Claim Count) — Part B Non-Institutional 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total count of Medicare Part B non-institutional claims for the beneficiary during 
the year. The Part B non-institutional claims include: Carrier and Durable Medical Equipment (DME). 
Note that only fee-for-service (FFS) claims are included. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: Medicare Carrier
